positive: A highly detailed, abstract celestial botanical illustration featuring intertwined elements of crescent moons, stylized lunar phases, blooming mandalas, and vibrant geometric vines. The central composition should showcase a stylized, luminous forest canopy viewed from above, rendered in a clean, high-contrast line art style mixed with solid geometric fills. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep indigo, burnt sienna, ethereal gold, and stark ivory. The style must emulate a modern engraved woodcut combined with vector art, emphasizing perfect symmetry and bold, crisp silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. The composition must be perfectly balanced and designed to be read as a single, continuous artwork.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, logo, trademark, copyright, messy, distorted, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, sketch, pencil drawing, photography, human hands, speech bubble
